title: Static MVP Primary Demo Handoff Preview
spec_summary: This handoff contains a static representation of the primary demo path, selected context, governed spec fields, D-005 gating, trace evidence, validation readiness and handoff preview.
primary_demo_path: rough context -> governed spec -> decision/evidence gate -> handoff preview
objective: Align the static MVP around selected rough context becoming a governed spec and a D-005-gated handoff preview.
forbidden_actions: Do not create real repo scanning or external connectors
Do not change product scope outside the static Builder Enablement OS demonstration
Do not modify files outside allowed paths
required_work: Show selected context and protected exclusions on Workbench
Show governed spec fields and acceptance-criteria readiness on Spec Builder
Show D-005 as the Codex handoff governance checkpoint
Show context, spec, decision, validation and placeholder evidence links
Keep the handoff preview static and mock-only
acceptance_criteria: User can visually understand rough context -> governed spec -> decision/evidence gate -> handoff preview
D-005 is visible as the handoff gating decision
Missing acceptance criteria, evidence, or open Decision state visibly blocks readiness
The preview remains static and mock-only
stop_conditions: Stop if a dependency is required
Stop if real repo access or external connector access is needed
Stop if files outside allowed paths must change
Stop if validation fails and cannot be fixed within scope
Stop if product/architecture decision is required

evidence_items.summary: Selected Context is visible on Workbench and excludes runtime state, secrets and repo write authority.
Missing until Point locks D-005 for the static handoff preview.
Static readiness is blocked while spec fields, evidence review, or D-005 are unresolved.
The placeholder exists as local mock data only and is not a produced handoff artifact.

validation_results.summary: Repo validation may pass while handoff readiness remains blocked by local mock criteria.

validation_results.scope: Manual eight-page static MVP smoke check
validation_results.summary: All eight pages must remain reachable without network/API calls before demo use.

blocked_reasons: Required evidence is missing or unreviewed
